test.name: FamilySearch wiki — Italian birth records
test.description: The happy path: the user explicitly names the FamilySearch wiki and asks a how-to research question. Exercises the core workflow — call wiki_search, synthesize the ranked sections, and save a markdown file with cited sources.

input.user_message: Search the FamilySearch wiki for guidance on how to find Italian birth records

judge_context: Should call wiki_search with a natural-language query about finding Italian birth records
The saved file should synthesize the returned wiki sections and cite their source URLs — no fabricated guidance beyond what the tool returned
